name: CUT-B1: identity spine cutover - flag plumbing, maintenance gates, bootstrap graph, person-scope twins
description: EXECUTION GATE: starts only after the new-llm merge lands on main (PRG-17 boundary event 'new-llm merged') - CUT-A's drizzle generate must run against the post-merge journal. Depends on CUT-A (twins read/write sec-1 objects). Plan sec-3 row 1 + sec-2.1/2.2/2.2a/2.3a. One reviewable PR: typed-config IDENTITY_V2_ENABLED plumbing + the FLAG-OFF BREAK TEST (literal 'false' AND unset both select legacy, zero new-model DB calls); two-stage maintenance gate middleware (MAINTENANCE_READONLY + MAINTENANCE_BLOCK_INNGEST) mounted BEFORE auth/account resolution, /v1/inngest exempt in stage 1; resolveIdentityV2 + createIdentityGraph() per sec-2.2a (graph at onboarding completion per OQ-1 ruling (c): transaction with reverse person.login_id wire, idempotent on login.clerk_user_id, BUG-411 email-reclaim guard with constraint-discriminating catch + regression test, pairwise calendar-valid birth dates, trial_ends_at = computeTrialEndDate, pre-graph webhook ack-200 + Sentry path); the consent-status READ module per sec-2.3a (basis-explicit + AnyBasis variants, current-row windowing, legacy-faithful request-time ordering); profileMeta v2; person-scope twins (profile, settings, onboarding, learner-profile, session-cache/exchanges context, snapshot-aggregation, coaching-cards); shared helpers (ii)-(v); test-seed v2 core; the B1-row Inngest functions (sec-2.5). Flag stays 'false' in every deployed env until convergence step 7. Single-live-store argument 1 documented in the PR.
acceptanceCriteria: Flag-off break test green; no deployed env sets the flag; v2 modules unreachable flag-off (dispatcher defaults legacy, legacy byte-identical except seam indirection); BUG-411 regression red-green recorded; CI green; single-live-store argument in PR description.
riskImpact: P1/High-care: auth/account bootstrap chain - the plan's sensitive surface 1.
